title: tinus verrucosa
intro: Tinus verrucosa, also known as the rough-leaved dogwood, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cornaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels, and aiding in the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. Tinus verrucosa can be prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being made into a tincture or used in traditional herbal remedies.
